metadata.description: 의사결정·건강·투자·부동산·학습·개발·심리·양육·소통 프레임워크 9종 묶음. 학술 이론(Porter/Drucker/Markowitz/Ebbinghaus/Bjork 등) + 한국 맥락(세제·제도·문화) 내장. 메타 라우터 방식으로 상황에 맞는 프레임워크 자동 선택.

plugins.name: strategy-frameworks
plugins.description: Strategic Thinking Agent — meta-router for 47 business strategy frameworks (Porter, Drucker, Wardley, Blue Ocean, BMC, Lean Startup, OKR, Disruptive Innovation, Scenario Planning, Real Options, Game Theory, etc.). Invoke /think.

plugins.name: investment-framework
plugins.description: Personal investment meta-router — 12 frameworks (MPT, All Weather, Bogleheads, Barbell, Value, Factor, DCA, Rebalancing, Kelly Criterion, Korean Tax, Korean FIRE). Korean tax regime built-in. NOT investment advice. Invoke /money.

plugins.name: real-estate-framework
plugins.description: Korean real estate meta-router — 9 frameworks (Hedonic, DiPasquale-Wheaton, Alonso-Muth-Mills, Cap Rate, Harrison Cycle, HBU, Redevelopment, Subscription, Gap Investment). Jeonse and HUG insurance built-in. Invoke /realty.

plugins.name: software-framework
plugins.description: Software engineering meta-router — 12 frameworks (Scientific Debugging, Bisection, Observability, Hexagonal, DDD, Event Sourcing/CQRS, Modular Monolith, SOLID, 12-Factor, Resilience, Strangler Fig, Team Topologies). Invoke /code.

plugins.name: health-framework
plugins.description: Health & training meta-router — 12 evidence-based frameworks (Mediterranean Diet, Low Carb, Intermittent Fasting, Macro Tracking, Progressive Overload, Strength, Hypertrophy, Polarized Endurance, Sleep, Recovery, Biomarkers, Body Comp). NOT medical advice. Invoke /fit.

plugins.name: learning-framework
plugins.description: Adult learning meta-router — 12 cognitive science frameworks (Zettelkasten, PARA, Evergreen Notes, Spaced Repetition, Active Recall, Feynman, Interleaving, Deliberate Practice, Chunking, Deep Work, Pomodoro, Metalearning). Korean learner context. Invoke /learn.

plugins.name: counsel-frameworks
plugins.description: Psychological Framework Learning Tool — meta-router for 14 counseling frameworks (CBT, ACT, SFBT, MI, IFS, Narrative, MBSR, MBCT, PPT, REBT, Gottman, DBT Skills, Worden's Grief, PCT). NOT a replacement for professional therapy. Invoke /counsel.

plugins.name: parenting-frameworks
plugins.description: Parenting & Education Framework Guide — 16 frameworks (Positive Discipline, PET, CPS, Emotion Coaching, Triple P, Attachment Parenting, SDT, Retrieval Practice, Growth Mindset, UbD, PBL, Montessori, DAP, UDL, Formative Assessment, Differentiated Instruction). Invoke /parenting.

plugins.name: howtotalk
plugins.description: Meta Communication Agent — routes among 14 communication frameworks (NVC, Getting to Yes, Never Split the Difference, Radical Candor, Crucial Conversations, Difficult Conversations, Active Listening, DESC, Influence, MI, SCARF, Socratic, Storytelling). Invoke /howtotalk.
